package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsToupperEqualfold() string {
    ruleID := "strings_toupper_equalfold"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.ToUpper(...) == strings.ToUpper(...)` instead of `strings.EqualFold(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
